zh.lifeSummary: John Gisburn Mayor of York於1336年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。他於1363年與Ellen de Baguley在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1390年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

variants.name: Gisborne
meanings: English: locative name from Gisburn (WR Yorks), recorded as Gisilburn in 1285, Gisebourgh in 1301.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: John Gisburn Mayor of York was born in 1336, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Ellen de Baguley in 1363, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gisburn Mayor of Yorkは1336年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた。1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでEllen de Baguleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1390年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gisburn Mayor of York(은)는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났다. 그는 1363년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Ellen de Baguley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Gisburn Mayor of York родился в 1336 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Baguley в 1363 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
